---
title: "icosphere_bary_upsampler"
generated: true
description: "Fine-from-coarse barycentric upsampler ELL."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:icosphere_bary_upsampler -->
```python
icosphere_bary_upsampler(hierarchy: IcosphereHierarchy, coarse_level: int, fine_level: int) -> ELL
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:icosphere_bary_upsampler -->
Fine-from-coarse barycentric upsampler ELL.

Row `i` (fine vertex at level `fine_level`) carries the
coarse-vertex sources at level `coarse_level` and the
barycentric weights:

- Coarse-original fine vertex `i`: one source (`i` itself)
  with weight `1` (and a padded second slot, weight `0`).
- Midpoint fine vertex of coarse edge `(a, b)`: two sources
  (`a`, `b`) with weights `(0.5, 0.5)`.

Feeds [`mesh_bary_upsample`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/mesh_bary_upsample.qmd) to
interpolate per-vertex coordinates or features from the coarse
level to the fine level.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:icosphere_bary_upsampler -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `hierarchy` | `IcosphereHierarchy` | — | — | An [`IcosphereHierarchy`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/IcosphereHierarchy.qmd) produced by [`icosphere_hierarchy`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/icosphere_hierarchy.qmd). |
| `coarse_level` | `int` | — | — | Must be consecutive: `fine_level == coarse_level + 1`. |
| `fine_level` | `int` | — | — | Must be consecutive: `fine_level == coarse_level + 1`. |

**Returns** `ELL`. An [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ELL.qmd) of shape `(n_fine, n_coarse)` with `k_max = 2`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
